MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-20-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-20-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 A.M. On May 12, 2003
Off Calendar May-13-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, and CSR: Patricia Dowling.
Appearances: Douglas Holloway, Esq. For Plaintiff Trinity Capital Corp. also present.
Defendants not present.
Plaintiff witness, Ernest Knowles, V.P., was sworn and examined.
EXH. 1 - Lease agreement ---------ID/EVID
The Court hears evidence and grants judgment in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant, Advanced Flex, Inc., as follows:
Principal amount of $35,547.44, Interest $3,428.48, Costs $256.00, Attorney fee $2,500.00. For the total of $41,731.92
Does 1-10 are dismissed without prejudice.
Counsel stipulated for return of the exhibit.
Judgment signed in open court.
Motion For Order Striking Answer & Entering Default Against Deft For Failure To Comply With Discovery Order

MOTION To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Dec-19-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Timothy Hix, Esq. of MICHELMAN & ROBINSON 818/783-5530, for attorneys Mark J. Moxness and C. John Jossart of Krass, Monroe, moving party
No other appearance on this matter. The Court granted Attorneys Mark J. Moxness and C. John Jossart's MOTION To Be Relieved As Counsel, on the condition that plaintiff's counsel is stayed from serving the 12/10/2002 order (Order granting plaintiff's motion to compel responses) for a period of 15 days after the date of service of this order. (AJR/301) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR #7855
